subTitle: Questions about custom boat builds, marine repairs, fabricated parts, fuel tanks, or UltraDeck flooring?

faqs.question: What kinds of boats do you work on?
faqs.answer: We work on a wide range of aluminum boats, from small skiffs to 40 ft ocean boats. That includes fishing boats, workboats, utility boats, and other marine projects that need custom fabrication or repair.

faqs.question: Do you only build boats, or do you also handle repairs?
faqs.answer: Repairs are a major part of our work. We handle structural boat repairs, cracked or failed welds, fabricated replacement parts, deck and transom work, and other custom repair jobs that keep boats safe and functional.

faqs.question: Can you fabricate custom boat parts and fuel tanks?
faqs.answer: Yes. We regularly build custom marine parts such as brackets, hatches, consoles, transoms, and fuel tanks. Everything is fabricated to suit the boat, the space available, and the intended use.

faqs.question: Do you install UltraDeck marine flooring?
faqs.answer: Yes. We install UltraDeck marine flooring for boat owners who want better traction, comfort, and a cleaner finished look. It is a strong option for fishing boats, workboats, and family boats alike.

faqs.question: How do you price custom boat builds and repair work?
faqs.answer: Every project is quoted based on the boat, the scope of work, materials, and fabrication complexity. That lets us provide realistic pricing for anything from a small repair to a full custom build.

faqs.question: How do I get a quote for my boat project?
faqs.answer: Reach out through the contact page with details about your boat, the work needed, and any photos or measurements you have. We will review the project and follow up with the next steps for quoting.
